author: prncc
description: Review notes using periodic or spaced repetition.

manifest.author: Andre Perunicic
manifest.description: Review notes using periodic or spaced repetition.
manifest.name: Repeat

name: Repeat

releases.author: prncc
releases.description:
## What's Changed

* Add mostly tag-based filtering to review interface by @prncc in https://github.com/prncc/obsidian-repeat-plugin/pull/46
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/prncc/obsidian-repeat-plugin/compare/1.10.0...2.0.0

releases.author: prncc
releases.description:
Add the ability to repeat notes on certain days of the week each week. For example:

```
repeat: every tuesday and friday
```

releases.author: prncc
releases.description: This release lets you easily add the `repeat` field to notes. Toggle on "Enqueue non-repeating notes" in settings and notes without a repeat field will show up at the end of the queue, sorted by file creation time (oldest to newest). Repeat options are taken from the default repeat period, and a special "never" repeat option is added (so that the note you're looking at stops appearing in the queue).

releases.author: prncc
releases.description:
- Support `repeat: never` to explicitly prevent a note from repeating. This is useful if you use search, automation, or triaging to pick which notes to start repeating.
- Support customizing the pre-filled interval in the `Repeat this note...` command.

releases.author: prncc
releases.description: Fixes #36 where the local graph goes blank if the user clicks the reviewed note's embed link in the Repeat view.

releases.author: prncc
releases.description: Update small typo in README and use "property" instead of "field".

releases.author: prncc
releases.description:
* Add `repeat: never` option to explicitly exclude notes from repetition. The effect of this field is the same as not having any `repeat` value. This is specifically useful if you want to add notes to review in bulk, and don't want to sort through the same notes each time.
* Update the readme.

releases.author: prncc
releases.description: Fixes bug #28 wherein the period unit was reset when skipping spaced notes.

releases.author: prncc
releases.description:
* Allow setting the morning and evening review times in settings (#26)
* Minor internal code updates (requiring at least 1.1.0) (#27)

releases.author: prncc
releases.description: Repeat notes will now scale with Obsidian's Zoom Level and Font Size options from the Appearance tab.

releases.author: prncc
releases.description: Enhancement: Support the repeat field format `spaced daily/weekly/monthly/yearly` in addition to `spaced every ...` for consistency between spaced and periodic notes. That is, now you can add `spaced ` in front of any periodic repeat field value to convert a note from periodic to spaced.

releases.author: prncc
releases.description: Simplify and update the README.

releases.author: prncc
releases.description: Fix bug that prevented "Repeat this note every X" commands from adding fields to frontmatter-less notes.

releases.author: prncc
releases.description: Implement the `hidden` frontmatter field. Setting `hidden: true` in the frontmatter makes the affected note's body blurred during repeats, and thus provides one-sided flashcard functionality to the plugin.

releases.author: prncc
releases.description:
* Fix note titles not being noticeable on desktop.
* Add debouncing when updating the due note count and re-rendering the active not in the repeat view. This should greatly speed up the plugin on mobile. See #6.

releases.author: prncc
releases.description: Keep the due at summary in the repeat modal automatically updated, and have it clarify when a note is overdue.

releases.author: prncc
releases.description: Fix for a bug in which the same note could be shown after review due to a race condition.

releases.author: prncc
releases.description:
Fixes:

* The Repeat modal now correctly sets the repeat due date when the parameters are changed more than once.
* The built-in commands now update the frontmatter even if the note is not in "edit" view.

releases.author: prncc
releases.description:
New features:

* You can now specify a folder to ignore when determining which notes become due. This is useful for templating. 

Fixes:

* Obsidian no longer takes a while to become responsive if Repeat is enabled with a large vault. See Issue #6.
* Fixed an issue where the "N repeat notes due" status text would be duplicated when its setting is toggled.

Special thanks to @wei2912 for adding the new feature, reporting the first issue, and fixing the second.

releases.author: prncc
releases.description:
Improvements to the Repeat view and a bug fix.

New features:

- Keep current note in sync with external edits. The plugin should now handle note renames, edits, and deletion of the note being reviewed.
- Add a refresh button to the view when no more notes are due.

Fixes:

- Fix bug which caused due notes to appear out of order.

Other:

- Bump luxon to the latest version.

releases.author: prncc
releases.description:
Bug fixes and quality-of-life improvements.

Fixes:

* Fix cross-platform resource path resolution
* Fix spaced note repeat choice calculation

Changes of behavior:

* Load current repetition state into custom repeat modal
* Make the default custom repetition strategy SPACED (if repetition doesn't exist in note)
* Limit the width of the note being reviewed
* Respect time of day preference in spaced notes due in a week or more
* Only embed PDFs on desktop devices

releases.author: prncc
releases.description: Update the plugin id: obsidian-repeat-plugin -> repeat-plugin.

releases.author: prncc
releases.description: Update styles after Obsidian's 1.0.0 release.

releases.author: prncc
releases.description: Initial release. See the README at https://github.com/prncc/obsidian-repeat-plugin for a detailed description.
